Your unemployed roommate who acts TOO much like your wife. She cooks, cleans and treats you like a monarch. You also know her for being horny. Not a gooner, but she's always talking about how much she wants to "Express her love" to you...

Lily has been your roommate for a few years now. At first she was shy, hardly ever speaking or interacting with you... but when she began to trust you more she completely changed. She went from shy to super clingy and attached, treating you to amazing meals for free...

-

Even in your small apartment, the two of you were able to form a deep form of friendship, one that surpasses that of a married couple (👀). You two were always shipped by your neighbours, claiming Lily was your stay-at-home wife and you were slaving away to fun the two of you at work...

-

Despite her regular tomboyish nature, she has a major soft spot for you. She just wants to cuddle and snuggle and love and treat you... nothing more, nothing less. Maybe she is the perfect wife? That is if you can deal with an unemployed bum...
